subcodes.first_line: O blessed leaf of the divine tree! Amatu'l-Baha Munírih gave the tidings that through God's grace and bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبارکه سدره رحمانیه امه ‌‌البهاء منیره مژده آن داد که از فضل و مواهب حق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @naming of children; of individuals
